commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps text toolResult blocks in the shared transport transform with external-content markers and adds regression coverage for wrapped and pre-wrapped results.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +70. Total +127 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. with high confidence from source and the PR discussion: a text toolResult containing raw boundary marker names takes the isTransportBoundaryWrapped() early return, and the reviewer comment reports changed=false/securityNotice=false on the PR head.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are security-sensitive boundary review, a P1 patch defect, and contributor-owned real payload proof, so this should stay in maintainer/contributor review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: security: wrap tool results at transport boundary
target.body:
## Summary
- wrap tool-result text at the generic transport boundary using existing external-content security markers
- preserve already bounded tool results to avoid double-wrapping
- add regression coverage for wrapped and already-wrapped tool results

## Verification
- pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/transport-message-transform.test.ts
- pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --pretty false
- git diff --check
target.author: zeusbot-ron
